buildCommand: rm -rf dist node_modules/.cache .expo && npx expo export --platform web --clear

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://browser.sentry-cdn.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://*.sentry.io wss://*.supabase.co; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none';
